stages.task: Speak with Priscilla in the catacombs.
stages.description: Priscilla Afer keeps checking an empty cord at her wrist.

stages.task: Find Jeremiah near Hallowfen and give him the necklace.
stages.description: Priscilla gave you Jeremiah's lucky necklace. Her husband left for Hallowfen chasing wall pay and forgot the charm he trusted most.
Jeremiah has his lucky necklace again.
